news.t: First Trust Takes Dividend Achievers Suite International with Launch of IDVY ETF

holdings.infoBox: IDVY is an equity ETF with a total of 158 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lasertec stock at 2.54%, SK hynix at 2.44%, ASML Holding at 1.72%, Sumitomo Electric Industries at 1.71%, and Niterra at 1.54%.

overview.description: The First Trust International Rising Dividend Achievers ETF (IDVY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index comprised of developed-market firms outside the US that have demonstrated rising dividends and earnings growth. The fund aims to provide broad international equity exposure weighted by fundamental factors. IDVY was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Nasdaq International Rising Dividend Achievers Index

data.title: First Trust Takes Dividend Achievers Suite International with Launch of IDVY ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider with more than $219 billion in ETF assets under management as of December 31,...
